commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Remove a Vehicle from its VehicleUpdateTask when it is destroyed.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Fixed vehicle module update data becoming disconnected after a configuration update. This manifested as a lack of e.g. plumes and sound effects when launching a new vehicle.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Reinitialize thread worker state after a part tree update so that the flight computer is operating on the proper set of states.

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Improved Earth grass lighting, see below. These are not energy conserving, and a more general purpose foliage BSDF may be added later.
Added new ground clutter lighting option 'bias normals upward'. This allows for grass to be lit like the terrain while maintaining their geometry normals for other lighting effects up close.
Added new ground clutter lighting option 'apply extra spec'.
Added new ground clutter option 'distance fade dither'.
Added new ground clutter option 'transmissive' and support for a thickness texture.
Added additional specular to Earth's grass.
Added cheap transmittance to Earth's grass.
Improved the transition from grass to terrain using a dithering fade.
Improved readability of ground clutter spec constant flags.
Rolled up ground clutter instancing pipeline bindings into GroundClutterCommon.glsl.
Increased the contrast and resolution of Earth's grass diffuse texture.
Added logging info that states the time taken to compile the ground clutter shaders and build the render resources of the ecotypes.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Moved docking commands to the new input events processing.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Fixed bug where vehicle configuration was not being correctly updated when docking.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Removed debug code for particles which would force them to always be relative to the vehicle the camera is currently focused on.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Moved TransferPlanner burn creation commands to new input events processing.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Made ImGui descriptor pool thread safe since it's being used from multiple threads during loading.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Added basic WIP decoupler particle effects.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Moved all remaining Burn related UI inputs to the new input events processing.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Changed InputEvents TypedBuffer<T> to have available Sort() on events prior to executing.
Changed Burn buffer to Sort events first in order of Delete, Add, Update before execution.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Fixed kittens T-Posing when first looked at.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Reverted previous commit, that change added some extra edge cases that I missed when testing.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Added particle quality settings. This affects the maximum number of particles that emitters will spawn.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Changed IActivate implementations to process updates via tghe new InputEvents buffer.
Added ability to override buffer size on TypedBuffer<T>.
Added handling of buffer overflow in TypedBuffer<T>.Add method to double the buffer size if it overflows.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Changed Teleport functions to use the new InputEvents buffer.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Particle Emitters now support per particle rotations.
Particle angular velocity can now be set in XML.
Cleaned up particle emitter presets to use shared static functions. These are just helpers for the common usecases however there is no expection that every particle emitter will use them.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Removal of DMZ. We now have the FULL frame to execute vehicle and orbit workers.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Minor cleanup of particle emitter presets.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Small improvement to action sphere tests for vehicle clustering.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Fixed kittens initally blending from an invalid animation when first updating.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Optimized kitten animation pipeline, this reduces the frametime by ~4ms.
Added basic animation culling system to only update animations at a certain distance.
Certain static animations (Facial expressions, blinking, ear masks) are now only updated once and cached instead of being updated every frame.

commits.author: Dan Southon
lines: Adjusted default cascade splits
Adjusted cascade shadow biasing

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Kitten fur now gets rendered into the depth pre pass. This means that fur fragments are only rendered when visible.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Merged the two interal Vehicle constructors down into One.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Removed Vehicle.Destroy() and merged it with vehicle.Dispose(), as they were nearly doing the same thing (but not consistently).
Removed Vehicle._beingDestroyed since it should not be necessary now that disposal is consistent.
Moved disposal of VehicleUpdateState from VehicleUpdateTask to Vehicle, where it belongs.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Added GetAngularVelocity convenience methods for CCI and CCE to IParentBody, and used them in many places where these were redundantly constructed.
